Features Starter
$9/mo Pro
$29/mo Enterprise
$99/mo {features.map((feature) => ( {feature.name} {typeof feature.starter === 'boolean' ? (feature.starter ? : ) : feature.starter} {typeof feature.pro === 'boolean' ? (feature.pro ? : ) : feature.pro} {typeof feature.enterprise === 'boolean' ? (feature.enterprise ? : ) : feature.enterprise} ))}
); }
